title: Cosmos Modern Gallery — a 3D cylindrical photo carousel (drag to spin, click to focus)
title_vi: Cosmos Modern Gallery — băng chuyền ảnh hình trụ 3D (kéo để xoay, bấm để phóng to)
summary: A 3D cylindrical photo carousel in deep perspective: 30 tiles on a rotating cylinder. Drag / swipe to spin and tilt the ring; click a tile to swing it to centre and enlarge while others dim; idle auto-drift + mouse parallax. Pure CSS-3D + a little JS, procedural gradient placeholders (white-label). Offline, reduced-motion aware.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html. TECHNIQUES: transform-style preserve-3d ring; each tile rotateY(col·angle) translateZ(R) translateY(row); rAF spin/tilt with eased auto-drift; shortest-path focus spin; pop via translateZ+scale. INTERACTION: drag=spin+tilt; click tile=focus. TUNE: COLS/ROWS, radius R, spin speed.
summary_vi: Băng chuyền ảnh hình trụ 3D phối cảnh sâu: 30 ô trên trụ xoay. Kéo/vuốt để xoay + nghiêng; bấm 1 ô để ra giữa + phóng to, các ô khác mờ đi; tự trôi khi rảnh. CSS-3D thuần + ít JS. Ảnh gradient placeholder (white-label). Offline.
